data.title: Binance Alpha airdrop will be available starting at 18:00 today.
data.description: Binance Wallet announced on its X platform that the Binance Alpha airdrop will open for collection today at 10:00 AM (UTC). Users holding at least 251 Binance Alpha tokens can claim their tokens on a first-come, first-served basis until the airdrop pool is exhausted or the event ends. Specific airdrop token types and the latest updates will be announced through official Binance channels.

data.title: Ionic Digital Reports Decline in January Bitcoin Mining Output
data.description: Bitcoin mining company Ionic Digital has released an unaudited report detailing its mining and operational activities. According to ChainCatcher, the report reveals that the company mined 34.68 BTC in January, marking a 7.1% decrease from the previous month. Despite the decline in output, Ionic Digital has not sold any Bitcoin, and its total Bitcoin holdings have increased to 2,754.8 BTC.

data.title: U.S. Economic Data Release May Impact Federal Reserve's Rate Decisions
data.description: The United States is set to release significant economic data at 21:30 UTC+8, including the December PCE Price Index and the annualized quarterly GDP rate for the fourth quarter. According to ChainCatcher, market expectations suggest a moderate rise in inflation and a resilient economy. This combination could influence the Federal Reserve's outlook on interest rate cuts and strengthen the argument for maintaining current rates. Investors should be cautious of potential market fluctuations during this period.

data.title: Poland's President Vetoes Cryptocurrency Bill, Raising Regulatory Concerns
data.description: Poland's President has vetoed a cryptocurrency market bill for the second time, which was intended to align with the European Union's Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) regulation. According to NS3.AI, this decision prevents the establishment of a national licensing system for crypto firms in Poland. With the EU-wide MiCA implementation deadline set for July 2026, the absence of a clear domestic regulatory framework is causing uncertainty among crypto businesses in the country. This situation raises concerns about compliance and market stability as firms navigate the evolving regulatory landscape.

data.title: Dubai's Leading Bank Expands in Asia Amid Growing Capital Flows
data.description: Dubai's premier banking institution is broadening its presence in Asia, driven by increasing capital movements between the Middle East and rapidly expanding Asian markets. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the bank's strategic efforts to tap into the burgeoning economic opportunities in the region. This expansion aligns with the bank's objective to strengthen its international operations and capitalize on the dynamic growth prospects in Asia. The move is part of a broader strategy to enhance connectivity and financial integration between these economically vibrant regions.

data.title: The Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission has listed the "HOMEO Trend" token as a suspicious investment product.
data.description: Information disclosed on the official website of the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission shows that the “HOMEO Trend” token has been listed as a suspicious investment product. It is understood that the product is suspected of being offered to the Hong Kong public, claiming that purchasing the product can bring investment returns to investors. Information about the token was distributed to investors at seminars held in Hong Kong.

data.title: Ionic Digital: January mining yielded 34.68 BTC, bringing total holdings to 2,754.8 BTC.
data.description: Bitcoin mining company Ionic Digital released its unaudited mining and operations update for January 2026, disclosing that it mined 34.68 BTC in January, a 7.1% decrease from the previous month. The company also reported no Bitcoin sales, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings to 2,754.8 BTC. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Fire at Japanese Temple Claims Five Lives
data.description: A fire broke out at a temple in Shimonoseki City, Yamaguchi Prefecture, Japan, resulting in the deaths of five individuals. According to Jin10, the local fire department received a report of the fire at approximately 2:30 a.m. local time on February 20. The blaze was extinguished about three hours later, having destroyed three buildings, including the main hall and residential quarters. Five bodies were discovered at the scene. Local police and fire authorities are currently investigating the details of the fire and working to identify the victims.

data.title: Unicity Labs raises $3 million in seed funding, led by Blockchange Ventures.
data.description: Unicity Labs, a company developing autonomous internet protocols, announced the completion of a $3 million seed funding round, led by Blockchange Ventures, with participation from Middle Eastern communications app Tawasal and Web3 early-stage investor Outlier Ventures. The company plans to use the new funds to build a peer-to-peer encrypted architecture that will enable autonomous AI agents to discover services, verify counterparties, and conduct transactions at machine speed, without the need for intermediaries or shared ledgers. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Temasek and Abu Dhabi Investment Authority to Invest in Clean Max IPO
data.description: Temasek Holdings and the Abu Dhabi Investment Authority are set to participate in the initial public offering (IPO) of Clean Max, a renewable energy company. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the strategic move by these investment giants to support Clean Max's expansion in the renewable energy sector. The IPO aims to raise capital to further develop Clean Max's infrastructure and projects, aligning with global trends towards sustainable energy solutions. This investment reflects a growing interest in green energy initiatives, as major investors seek to capitalize on the shift towards environmentally friendly technologies. Clean Max's IPO is expected to attract significant attention from investors looking to diversify their portfolios with sustainable assets.

data.title: Greece's AI Platform 'Lighthouse' to Launch in 2026
data.description: Greece's government announced on February 19 that the country's artificial intelligence platform project, 'Lighthouse,' is set to be fully operational by the first quarter of 2026. According to Jin10, the initiative aims to provide computational power, data, and technical support to startups, universities, and research institutions, fostering AI innovation and development. The 'Lighthouse' project is part of the European Union's 'AI Factory' network, launched in 2024, and is one of 13 selected AI factory projects across Europe.

data.title: India May Implement More Quality Control Orders to Boost Exports
data.description: India's Trade Secretary has indicated that the government might introduce additional quality control orders to support exports. According to Jin10, this move aims to enhance the quality of Indian export products through mandatory standards. The initiative reflects India's strategy to improve its export competitiveness by ensuring higher quality standards for its goods in the global market.

data.title: Anglo American Faces Further Writedown on De Beers Unit
data.description: Anglo American has announced another writedown on its De Beers unit, reflecting ongoing challenges in its diamond operations. Bloomberg posted on X that the company is grappling with declining earnings due to the underperformance of its diamond business. The writedown highlights the persistent difficulties faced by Anglo American in maintaining profitability within this sector. The diamond market has been under pressure, affecting the company's financial results and prompting the need for reassessment of its asset values. Anglo American's decision underscores the broader challenges in the diamond industry, which has been impacted by fluctuating demand and market conditions.

data.title: Microsoft's Collaboration with OpenAI Highlighted by President Brad Smith
data.description: Microsoft President Brad Smith emphasized the significance of the company's partnership with OpenAI during an interview with Bloomberg TV's Haslinda Amin. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Smith's remarks on the collaboration's impact on technological advancements. Smith noted that the alliance has fostered innovation and development in artificial intelligence, contributing to Microsoft's strategic goals. The partnership is seen as a pivotal move in enhancing AI capabilities and driving progress in the tech industry. Smith's comments reflect the company's commitment to leveraging AI for future growth and development.

data.title: A whale closed out its long positions in ETH and BTC, incurring a loss of nearly $600,000.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale, "0x049", just closed its long positions in ETH and BTC, incurring a loss of $598,369.

data.title: How to Build an Airbnb Clone with AI in Under an Hour
data.description:
The vacation rental market will surpass $120 billion by 2027. Building a marketplace to capture even a small slice of that used to mean hiring developers, spending six figures, and waiting half a year for a minimum viable product. That math has changed. AI-powered development tools now generate full-stack web applications from plain text descriptions
source: https://www.ethnews.com/how-to-build-an-airbnb-clone-with-ai-in-under-an-hour/

data.title: UK Retail Sales Experience Fastest Growth in 20 Months
data.description: UK retail sales have begun the year with their most rapid growth in 20 months, marking an unexpected increase that may aid the Labour government's economic revival initiatives. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the significance of this surge in retail activity. The growth in sales could provide a much-needed boost to the economy, which has been facing challenges in recent times. Analysts suggest that this positive trend might support the government's strategies aimed at economic recovery. The unexpected rise in retail sales is seen as a potential catalyst for further economic improvements.

data.title: Bitmine's total Ethereum staked amount surpasses 3 million, reaching a value of $6.1 billion.
data.description: Bitmine disclosed that its total Ethereum staked amount has surpassed 3 million, reaching 3,040,483 as of February 16, 2026 (a total value of $6.1 billion at $1,998 per ETH). Staking increased by approximately 1 million ETH in the past three weeks, and the current staked amount represents about 69% of its 4.37 million ETH holdings. According to Fundstrat data, as of February 13, 2026, Bitmine's stock had a 5-day average trading volume of $900 million, ranking 158th among 5,704 listed stocks in the US, ahead of CBRE (ranked 92,159th). (PRNewswire)

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Sibanye Stillwater Announces First Dividend Since 2023 Amid Metal Price Surge
data.description: Sibanye Stillwater has declared its first dividend since 2023, following a significant rally in the prices of precious metals it produces. Bloomberg posted on X that the company's decision comes after a notable increase in the value of these metals last year. The mining firm, known for its production of platinum, palladium, and gold, has benefited from favorable market conditions, prompting this financial move. The dividend announcement marks a positive shift for Sibanye Stillwater, reflecting its improved financial performance and strategic response to the market dynamics.
